org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders

类 MetadataReportBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.AbstractBuilder<MetadataReportConfig,MetadataReportBuilder>
      • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders.MetadataReportBuilder

  • public class MetadataReportBuilder
extends AbstractBuilder<MetadataReportConfig,MetadataReportBuilder>
    This is a builder for build MetadataReportConfig.
    从以下版本开始:
    2.7
